units.translation_target_text: – The liquidity position during the year was stable and did not fall below the target range; improvement measures were implemented to further strengthen liquidity management.
units.translation_en: – The liquidity position during the year was stable and did not fall below the target range; improvement measures were implemented to further strengthen liquidity management.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: – The liquidity position during the year was stable and did not fall below the target range; improvement measures were implemented to further strengthen liquidity management.

units.source_text: – 在卓越監管⽅⾯，最重⼤議題已取得良好進展。然⽽，集團本可採取更多措施，以加快郭珮瑛負
units.translation_target_text: – Good progress has been made on the most significant issues in regulatory excellence. However, the group could have taken more steps to expedite Guo Peiying's resignation.
units.translation_en: – Good progress has been made on the most significant issues in regulatory excellence. However, the group could have taken more steps to expedite Guo Peiying's resignation.
